$comment: SilentOps post-hoc audit workflow for Google Cloud Agent Builder. Orchestrates Gemini reasoning over partner-MCP-sourced data. This is the track-qualifying integration: Gemini + Agent Builder + Arize MCP (+ MongoDB MCP). Deploy by importing into an Agent Builder app and wiring the MCP servers from mcp-servers.json.
name: silentops-audit-workflow
description: Audit completed autonomous-agent tasks for silent failures, privacy retention, guardrail friction, and latent risk patterns.

inputs.agent_id: string (optional) — limit to one actor agent

steps.description: Introspect the agent's own traces/spans from Phoenix at runtime via Phoenix MCP (INGEST boundary). Raw — must be normalized next.
Hand raw traces to the SilentOps Normalizer: redact + mask sensitive values (privacy by construction) and emit AuditArtifacts. The Gemini reasoning steps NEVER see raw traces.
Per artifact, choose which of the 7 audit lenses apply (evidence-output, false-success, privacy-retention, goal-outcome, user-alignment, guardrail-friction, latent-risk-pattern).
Run the focused per-lens reasoning loop over the masked artifact + agent profile + history. Emit findings with severity, confidence, grounded evidence (no raw values), and detection_source.
Persist findings to MongoDB audit memory (MEMORY boundary). Privacy-safe records only.
Search/cluster recurring failure patterns across history via MongoDB aggregation.
Write regression eval cases (from confirmed findings) back to Phoenix as dataset examples, closing the audit→eval loop. Track runs with list-experiments-for-dataset.

privacy_invariant: MCP servers are wired only at the ingest and memory boundaries. The Gemini reasoning steps operate exclusively on normalized, redacted, masked artifacts via the in-process tool layer; raw sensitive values never reach the model.
fallback: When this Agent Builder workflow is not configured, the app runs the same pipeline in-process (Arize HTTP/OTLP + MongoDB Node.js driver + Gemini SDK) via WorkflowOrchestratorAdapter's local path, so local/seeded demo mode works without MCP access.
